## Merge checklist (maintainer)

Before merging, confirm:

- [ ] At least one **approving review** from the maintainer
- [ ] **All PR review comments** are resolved
- [ ] **`CI / verify`** is green (`npm run ci:verify` in CI)

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for details and GitHub branch protection setup.
